name: FPB Mobile Banking

name: PLUS+ Application
summary: The PLUS+ application is a lease-to-buy program specifically created as an employee benefit platform for the employees of legally registered companies and organizations in Myanmar. Through this program, employees have the opportunity to lease-to-buy products and services by making monthly repayments deducted from their salary over a fixed term. With a wide range of product categories and a streamlined process, PLUS+ provides a convenient and efficient way for employees to own the items on their wishlist. Experience a simpler, more intelligent, and faster way to access the products you desire with PLUS+ - the app that meets your needs.
challenges: Unified experience across mobile and web properties
outcomes: Streamlined platform delivery for end-users and admins

name: PLUS+ Admin and Merchant Portal
summary: Admin workflows for managing benefits, users, and approvals with strong performance and SEO.
challenges: Admin-level data visibility and access control
